es.ubu.lsi.client

Class ChatClientImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.ubu.lsi.client.ChatClientImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ChatClient

    public class ChatClientImpl
extends java.lang.Object
implements ChatClient
    Client.
    Author:
    http://www.dreamincode.net, Raúl Marticorena, Joaquin P. Seco, Marcelo Verteramo Pérsico

        text - Texto

      • isCommand

        private boolean isCommand(java.lang.String text,
                          ChatMessage.MessageType type)
        Verifica si la entrada del usuario es un comando determinado.
        Parameters:
        text - Entrada del usuario
        type - Comando a verificar
        Returns:
        Verdadero si la entrada coincide con el comando, Falso en caso contrario

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        Disconnect client closing resources.
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface ChatClient

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] args)
        Starts the client. To start the Client in console mode use one of the following command > java Client > java Client username > java Client username portNumber > java Client username portNumber serverAddress at the console prompt If the portNumber is not specified 1500 is used If the serverAddress is not specified "localHost" is used If the username is not specified "Anonymous" is used > java Client is equivalent to > java Client Anonymous 1500 localhost are equivalent. In console mode, if an error occurs the program simply stops when a GUI id used, the GUI is informed of the disconnection
        Parameters:
        args - arguments
